task_completion.description: Navigate to the Campus Security mailbox
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Campus Security' mailbox is selected or visible in the application's navigation menu.

task_completion.description: Open the target security incident conversation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The conversation titled 'Unauthorized Access Attempt - Building C Server Room' is opened and visible in the main viewing area.

task_completion.description: Open the interface to change the customer
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, modal, or input field for editing/changing the customer is open (typically accessed by clicking on the current customer 'Security Desk' in the sidebar or header).

task_completion.description: Search for or input the new customer details
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'James Whitfield' or email 'james.whitfield@securecampus.com' is typed into the customer search or selection field.

task_completion.description: Verify the conversation is successfully reassigned to the new customer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The conversation view clearly displays 'James Whitfield' (and/or his email) as the associated customer, replacing 'Security Desk'.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the FreeScout web interface in a browser, not terminal commands, API calls, or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual FreeScout application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application layout matches a standard webmail/ticketing system (FreeScout), not a text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (like the Elements or Console tab) are not open in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in the FreeScout application. The target conversation subject is 'Unauthorized Access Attempt - Building C Server Room'. The conversation must be reassigned to the customer 'James Whitfield' with the email 'james.whitfield@securecampus.com'.
